Saturday.prompt: Give a 5-minute TED-style talk (Topic: Academic Writing)

Sunday.prompt: Structured debate with rebuttals (Topic: Academic Writing)

Monday.prompt: Record a podcast segment (5 min) (Topic: Academic Writing)

Tuesday.prompt: Teach a concept to a beginner (Topic: Academic Writing)

Wednesday.prompt: Respond to unexpected prompts (Topic: Academic Writing)

Thursday.prompt: Mimic a native speaker clip perfectly (Topic: Academic Writing)

Friday.prompt: Speak naturally for 5+ minutes on any topic (Topic: Academic Writing)

writing_prompts: Write a persuasive essay on academic writing (300+ words, use rhetorical devices).
Write a critical analysis of a trend in academic writing.
Compose a formal report with recommendations about academic writing.
Write a creative piece (story/poem) inspired by academic writing.
Draft an opinion column for a newspaper about academic writing.
Write a comparison essay using academic vocabulary about academic writing.
Write freely about academic writing — focus on style, not just content.
